<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: 36 hours = 2 days before 01/01/2015 → 12/30/2014 → +7 days = 01/05/2015. The answer is 01/05/2015.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: 01/01/2019 is Tuesday, so first Monday is 6 days later → 01/07/2019. The answer is 01/07/2019.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: 06/01/1943 +1 day = 06/02/1943 → -10 days = 05/23/1943. The answer is 05/23/1943.<turn|>
<|turn>user
It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: 04/19/1969 +1 day = 04/20/1969. The answer is 04/20/1969.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jane thought today is 3/11/2002, but today is in fact Mar 12, which is 1 day later. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: correct date 03/12/2002; +1 day = 03/13/2002. The answer is 03/13/2002.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. What is the date yesterday in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
As a calendar solver: 02/28/2001; 16-year birthday 02/28/2017; yesterday 02/27/2017. The answer is 02/27/2017.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Today is 11/28/2018. What is the date 30 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
resps: As a calendar solver: 11/28/2018 + 30 days. November has 30 days. $30 - 28 = 2$ days left in November. $30 - 2 = 28$ days into December. The date is 12/28/2018. The answer is 12/28/2018.
